body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1. New test TestServerServiceRestart_ReconcilesDesiredWorkers starts a real test server or process-backed WorkerManager with desired_count=1, simulates server restart, and proves a fresh managed ddx work child appears without calling `ddx worker reconcile`.","coverage":"Child 1 AC1 and AC2 cover TestServerServiceRestart_ReconcilesDesiredWorkers and the no-manual-reconcile restart launch proof."},{"parent_ac":"2. New or extended test TestServerServiceRestart_RewritesServerAddrBeforeStatus proves the restarted server rewrites server.addr before `ddx worker status --json --project \u003cpath\u003e` observes a dead pid fallback.","coverage":"Child 2 AC1 covers TestServerServiceRestart_RewritesServerAddrBeforeStatus and the stale server.addr/dead pid fallback proof."},{"parent_ac":"3. `ddx worker status --json --project \u003cpath\u003e` after restart reports exactly the desired running worker for each valid project covered by the restart test.","coverage":"Child 2 AC2 and AC3 cover exact desired worker status reporting after restart without a manual reconcile."},{"parent_ac":"4. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/server/... ./cmd/...` passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC3 and Child 2 AC4 both require `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/server/... ./cmd/...`."},{"parent_ac":"5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC4 and Child 2 AC5 both require `lefthook run pre-commit`."}],"child_ids":["ddx-55efe79b","ddx-ae16a7a2"],"rationale":"The parent bead has two separable failure surfaces: startup reconciliation must relaunch real managed workers after restart, and restarted-server address/status plumbing must let clients observe the restored desired state instead of a dead pid fallback. Splitting along those boundaries keeps each child independently executable while preserving the parent non-scope constraints, governing artifact reference, parent ID, labels, and verification gates."}

summary: closed as dead-intermediate bead (all children closed, execution-eligible=false)
